import json

# Users - check all properties
with open('20260406071823_users.json') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
for u in data.get('data', data.get('users', [])):
    props = u.get('Properties', {})
    aces = u.get('Aces', [])
    name = props.get('name', 'unknown')
    spn = props.get('hasspn', False)
    enabled = props.get('enabled', False)
    admincount = props.get('admincount', False)
    desc = props.get('description', '')
    print(f'User: {name} enabled={enabled} admincount={admincount} hasspn={spn} desc={desc}')
    # Show inbound ACEs (who has rights over this user)
    if aces:
        for ace in aces:
            right = ace.get('RightName', '')
            principal = ace.get('PrincipalSID', '')
            ptype = ace.get('PrincipalType', '')
            if right not in ['', 'Owns'] or True:
                print(f'  ACE: {right} from {principal} ({ptype})')
    print()
" 2>&1

import json

    props = c.get('Properties', {})
    aces = c.get('Aces', [])
    name = props.get('name', 'unknown')
    os = props.get('operatingsystem', '')
    print(f'Computer: {name} os={os}')
    if aces:
        for ace in aces:
            right = ace.get('RightName', '')
            principal = ace.get('PrincipalSID', '')
            ptype = ace.get('PrincipalType', '')
            inherited = ace.get('IsInherited', False)
            if not inherited:  # focus on explicit ACEs
                print(f'  ACE: {right} from {principal} ({ptype})')
    print()
" 2>&1

import json
with open('20260406071823_users.json') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
for u in data.get('data', data.get('users', [])):
    props = u.get('Properties', {})
    sid = u.get('ObjectIdentifier', '')
    name = props.get('name', '')
    print(f'{sid} -> {name}')
with open('20260406071823_computers.json') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
for c in data.get('data', data.get('computers', [])):
    props = c.get('Properties', {})
    sid = c.get('ObjectIdentifier', '')
    name = props.get('name', '')
    print(f'{sid} -> {name}')
with open('20260406071823_groups.json') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
for g in data.get('data', data.get('groups', [])):
    props = g.get('Properties', {})
    sid = g.get('ObjectIdentifier', '')
    name = props.get('name', '')
    if '3105' in sid or '3107' in sid or '3104' in sid or '3106' in sid:
        print(f'{sid} -> {name} ***')
    # also check IT Support
    if 'IT' in name or 'TIER' in name.upper():
        print(f'{sid} -> {name} ***')
" 2>&1

python3 -c "
import json
with open('20260406071823_groups.json') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
for g in data.get('data', data.get('groups', [])):
    sid = g.get('ObjectIdentifier', '')
    props = g.get('Properties', {})
    name = props.get('name', '')
    aces = g.get('Aces', [])
    members = g.get('Members', [])
    if 'IT SUPPORT' in name.upper() or 'TIER' in name.upper():
        print(f'=== {name} ({sid}) ===')
        print(f'Members: {members}')
        print(f'Aces: {aces}')
        print()

# Also check: does IT Support or j.arbuckle have any outbound ACEs on other objects?
# Check all objects for ACEs from 3106 (IT Support) or 3101 (j.arbuckle)
print('=== Objects with ACEs from IT Support (3106) or j.arbuckle (3101) ===')
for fname in ['20260406071823_users.json', '20260406071823_computers.json', '20260406071823_groups.json']:
    with open(fname) as f:
        data = json.load(f)
    for obj in data.get('data', []):
        props = obj.get('Properties', {})
        name = props.get('name', 'unknown')
        for ace in obj.get('Aces', []):
            psid = ace.get('PrincipalSID', '')
            if '3106' in psid or '3101' in psid:
                print(f'  {name}: {ace[\"RightName\"]} from {psid}')
" 2>&1

# Proper raw ACL query with SD_FLAGS control to get DACL
# SD_FLAGS_OID = 1.2.840.113556.1.4.801, value=0x04 (DACL only)
python3 << 'PYEOF'
import ldap3
from ldap3 import Server, Connection, NTLM, SUBTREE, BASE
from ldap3.protocol.microsoft import security_descriptor_control

server = Server('10.129.17.44', get_info=ldap3.ALL)
conn = Connection(server, user='garfield.htb\\j.arbuckle', password='Th1sD4mnC4t!@1978', authentication=NTLM, auto_bind=True)

targets = [
    ('CN=Liz Wilson,CN=Users,DC=garfield,DC=htb', 'l.wilson'),
    ('CN=Liz Wilson ADM,CN=Users,DC=garfield,DC=htb', 'l.wilson_adm'),
    ('CN=RODC01,OU=Domain Controllers,DC=garfield,DC=htb', 'RODC01$'),
    ('CN=IT Support,CN=Users,DC=garfield,DC=htb', 'IT Support'),
    ('CN=Allowed RODC Password Replication Group,CN=Users,DC=garfield,DC=htb', 'Allowed RODC PRG'),
]

# SD_FLAGS control: request DACL (0x04)
controls = security_descriptor_control(sdflags=0x04)

for dn, label in targets:
    conn.search(dn, '(objectClass=*)', search_scope=BASE, 
                attributes=['nTSecurityDescriptor'], controls=controls)
    if conn.entries:
        sd_bytes = conn.entries[0]['nTSecurityDescriptor'].raw_values[0]
        print(f'\n=== {label} — SD size: {len(sd_bytes)} bytes ===')
        
        # Parse with impacket
        from impacket.ldap.ldaptypes import SR_SECURITY_DESCRIPTOR
        sd = SR_SECURITY_DESCRIPTOR()
        sd.fromString(sd_bytes)
        
        interesting_rids = ['3101', '3105', '3106', '3107', '3108', '1602', '1000']
        sid_names = {
            'S-1-5-21-2502726253-3859040611-225969357-3101': 'j.arbuckle',
            'S-1-5-21-2502726253-3859040611-225969357-3105': 'l.wilson',
            'S-1-5-21-2502726253-3859040611-225969357-3106': 'IT_Support',
            'S-1-5-21-2502726253-3859040611-225969357-3107': 'l.wilson_adm',
            'S-1-5-21-2502726253-3859040611-225969357-3108': 'Tier_1',
            'S-1-5-21-2502726253-3859040611-225969357-1602': 'RODC01$',
            'S-1-5-21-2502726253-3859040611-225969357-1000': 'DC01$',
        }
        
        # Well-known GUIDs for interesting rights
        guid_map = {
            '00299570-246d-11d0-a768-00aa006e0529': 'User-Force-Change-Password',
            'bf9679c0-0de6-11d0-a285-00aa003049e2': 'member',
            '5b47d60f-6090-40b2-9f37-2a4de88f3063': 'msDS-KeyCredentialLink',
            '3f78c3e5-f79a-46bd-a0b8-9d18116ddc79': 'msDS-AllowedToActOnBehalfOfOtherIdentity',
            '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000': 'ALL_PROPERTIES',
            'f3a64788-5306-11d1-a9c5-0000f80367c1': 'servicePrincipalName',
            '72e39547-7b18-11d1-adef-00c04fd8d5cd': 'DNS-Host-Name-Attributes',
            '4c164200-20c0-11d0-a768-00aa006e0529': 'User-Account-Restrictions',
        }
        
        dacl = sd['Dacl']
        for ace in dacl.aces:
            ace_data = ace['Ace']
            sid = ace_data['Sid'].formatCanonical()
            
            if any(rid in sid for rid in interesting_rids):
                mask = ace_data['Mask']['Mask']
                ace_type = ace['TypeName']
                sid_name = sid_names.get(sid, sid)
                
                # Decode rights
                rights = []
                if mask & 0x10000000: rights.append('GA')
                if mask & 0x40000000: rights.append('GW') 
                if mask & 0x20000: rights.append('DEL')
                if mask & 0x40000: rights.append('WDACL')
                if mask & 0x80000: rights.append('WOWNER')
                if mask & 0x100: rights.append('EXT_RIGHT')
                if mask & 0x20: rights.append('WP')
                if mask & 0x4: rights.append('CC')
                if mask & 0x10: rights.append('RP')
                if mask & 0x8: rights.append('LC')
                if mask & 0x2: rights.append('DC')
                if mask & 0x1: rights.append('SD')
                
                # Get ObjectType GUID if it's an object ACE
                obj_guid = ''
                inh_guid = ''
                try:
                    if hasattr(ace_data, '__getitem__'):
                        ot = ace_data['ObjectType']
                        if ot and str(ot) != '\x00'*16:
                            import uuid
                            g = str(uuid.UUID(bytes_le=bytes(ot)))
                            obj_guid = guid_map.get(g, g)
                except: pass
                try:
                    if hasattr(ace_data, '__getitem__'):
                        it = ace_data['InheritedObjectType']
                        if it and str(it) != '\x00'*16:
                            import uuid
                            g = str(uuid.UUID(bytes_le=bytes(it)))
                            inh_guid = guid_map.get(g, g)
                except: pass
                
                extra = ''
                if obj_guid: extra += f' obj={obj_guid}'
                if inh_guid: extra += f' inh={inh_guid}'
                
                print(f'  [{ace_type}] {sid_name} mask=0x{mask:08x} {"|".join(rights)}{extra}')
    else:
        print(f'\n=== {label} — no results ===')

conn.unbind()
PYEOF

print(f'Result: {result}')
print(f'Description: {conn.result["description"]}')
print(f'Message: {conn.result.get("message", "")}')

conn.unbind()

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import ldap3
from ldap3 import Server, Connection, NTLM, BASE
from ldap3.protocol.microsoft import security_descriptor_control
from impacket.ldap.ldaptypes import SR_SECURITY_DESCRIPTOR
import uuid

server = Server('10.129.17.44', get_info=ldap3.ALL)
conn = Connection(server, user='garfield.htb\\j.arbuckle', password='Th1sD4mnC4t!@1978', authentication=NTLM, auto_bind=True)

controls = security_descriptor_control(sdflags=0x04)

# Check the Users container and domain root for the IT Support ACE source
targets = [
    ('CN=Users,DC=garfield,DC=htb', 'Users container'),
    ('DC=garfield,DC=htb', 'Domain root'),
    ('OU=Domain Controllers,DC=garfield,DC=htb', 'Domain Controllers OU'),
]

for dn, label in targets:
    conn.search(dn, '(objectClass=*)', search_scope=BASE,
                attributes=['nTSecurityDescriptor'], controls=controls)
    if conn.entries:
        sd = SR_SECURITY_DESCRIPTOR()
        sd.fromString(conn.entries[0]['nTSecurityDescriptor'].raw_values[0])
        dacl = sd['Dacl']
        for ace in dacl.aces:
            ad = ace['Ace']
            sid = ad['Sid'].formatCanonical()
            if '3106' in sid:  # IT Support
                mask = ad['Mask']['Mask']
                flags = ace['AceFlags']
                ace_type = ace['TypeName']
                
                obj_guid = inh_guid = ''
                try:
                    ot = ad['ObjectType']
                    if ot: obj_guid = str(uuid.UUID(bytes_le=bytes(ot)))
                except: pass
                try:
                    it = ad['InheritedObjectType']
                    if it: inh_guid = str(uuid.UUID(bytes_le=bytes(it)))
                except: pass
                
                # ACE flags decode
                flag_names = []
                if flags & 0x01: flag_names.append('OBJECT_INHERIT')
                if flags & 0x02: flag_names.append('CONTAINER_INHERIT')
                if flags & 0x04: flag_names.append('NO_PROPAGATE')
                if flags & 0x08: flag_names.append('INHERIT_ONLY')
                if flags & 0x10: flag_names.append('INHERITED')
                
                print(f'[{label}] {ace_type} mask=0x{mask:08x} flags=0x{flags:02x}({"|".join(flag_names)}) obj={obj_guid} inh={inh_guid}')

conn.unbind()
PYEOF

python3 << 'PYEOF'
# bf9679a8-0de6-11d0-a285-00aa003049e2 = "member" attribute
# But on user objects, could this be something else? Let's check the schema
import ldap3
from ldap3 import Server, Connection, NTLM, SUBTREE

server = Server('10.129.17.44', get_info=ldap3.ALL)
conn = Connection(server, user='garfield.htb\\j.arbuckle', password='Th1sD4mnC4t!@1978', authentication=NTLM, auto_bind=True)

# Look up the schemaIDGUID bf9679a8-0de6-11d0-a285-00aa003049e2
# Need to search in Schema partition
schema_dn = server.info.other.get('schemaNamingContext', ['CN=Schema,CN=Configuration,DC=garfield,DC=htb'])[0]

# Convert GUID to ldap search format
import struct
guid = 'bf9679a8-0de6-11d0-a285-00aa003049e2'
guid_bytes = bytes.fromhex(guid.replace('-',''))
# schemaIDGUID is stored in MS byte order
parts = guid.split('-')
b = struct.pack('<IHH', int(parts[0],16), int(parts[1],16), int(parts[2],16))
b += bytes.fromhex(parts[3]) + bytes.fromhex(parts[4])
escaped = ''.join(f'\\{byte:02x}' for byte in b)

conn.search(schema_dn, f'(schemaIDGUID={escaped})', 
            attributes=['cn', 'lDAPDisplayName', 'adminDescription'])
for entry in conn.entries:
    print(f'GUID bf9679a8 = {entry.cn} / {entry.lDAPDisplayName}')
    print(f'  Description: {entry.adminDescription}')

conn.unbind()
PYEOF
